name: Document360Connector
description: Connects to the Document360 knowledge-base platform (Projects, Versions, Categories, Articles CRUD + publish + versions, Tags, Drive, Team, Languages, Templates, Search). Authenticates via a single api_token sent in the `api_token` request header. Syncs articles into the Shielva knowledge base as tenant-prefixed NormalizedDocuments.

install_fields.label: API Token
install_fields.help: From Document360 → Settings → API Tokens. Sent as the `api_token` request header (NOT Authorization: Bearer).

install_fields.label: Default Project ID
install_fields.placeholder: Optional — sync this project by default
install_fields.help: If set, sync() will pull articles from this project. Leave blank to pick the first project the token can see.

install_fields.label: Default Version ID
install_fields.placeholder: Optional — sync this version by default
install_fields.help: If set, sync() will pull articles from this version only. Leave blank to walk all versions of the default project.

install_fields.label: Default Language Code
install_fields.help: ISO 639-1 language code (en, fr, de, ja, …). Defaults to 'en' if blank.

install_fields.label: Public Site Slug
install_fields.help: Public Document360 site slug. Used to synthesise canonical article URLs of the form https://<slug>.document360.io/<lang>/article/<id>.

install_fields.label: Document360 API Base URL
install_fields.help: Base URL for the Document360 REST API. Leave blank to use the default.

install_fields.label: Rate Limit (requests/min)
install_fields.help: Maximum Document360 API requests per minute. Document360's standard quota is 100/min per token.

apis.name: Install Connector
apis.description: Validates the api_token is present and marks the connector as installed.

apis.name: Authorize
apis.description: Document360 uses a static API token — this method wraps the token in a TokenInfo and stores it via the SDK lifecycle.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Verifies Document360 API connectivity by listing projects.

apis.name: List Projects
apis.description: Returns all projects accessible to the api_token.

apis.name: Get Project
apis.description: Fetches a single project by id.

apis.name: List Versions
apis.description: Lists all versions of a project.

apis.name: List Languages
apis.description: Lists the languages enabled for a project.

apis.name: List Categories
apis.description: Lists categories for a version, optionally filtered by parent_category_id.

apis.name: Get Category
apis.description: Fetches a single category by id.

apis.name: Create Category
apis.description: Creates a new category under the supplied parent.

apis.name: Update Category
apis.description: Renames and/or reorders a category.

apis.name: Delete Category
apis.description: Deletes a category.

apis.name: List Articles
apis.description: Lists articles in a version, optionally filtered by category and language.

apis.name: Get Article
apis.description: Fetches a single article by id and returns it as a NormalizedDocument with id = `tenant_id_source_id`.

apis.name: Create Article
apis.description: Creates a new article under the supplied category.

apis.name: Update Article
apis.description: Updates an article's title and/or content.

apis.name: Delete Article
apis.description: Deletes an article.

apis.name: Publish Article
apis.description: Publishes (or republishes) an article in a specific language.

apis.name: List Article Versions
apis.description: Lists the historic versions of an article.

apis.name: Search Articles
apis.description: Full-text search across articles in a version.

apis.name: List Tags
apis.description: Lists tags defined in a version.

apis.name: List Team Members
apis.description: Lists team accounts (members + roles) for the account that owns the api_token.

apis.name: List Templates
apis.description: Lists article templates available in a version.

apis.name: List Drive Files
apis.description: Lists Drive (attachment) files, optionally filtered by folder.

apis.name: Upload Drive File
apis.description: Uploads a Drive (attachment) file. Content is sent as base64 in the JSON body.

apis.name: Sync Articles
apis.description: Walks the configured project's versions and articles and ingests each one as a NormalizedDocument (id = `tenant_id_source_id`).
